This is a testharness.js-based test.

  assert_equals: Check expected offsetTop expected -50 but got 0

  assert_equals: Check expected offsetTop expected -50 but got 0

  assert_equals: Check expected offsetWidth expected 450 but got 400

  assert_equals: Check expected offsetTop expected -50 but got 0
